# DataBuilder

> High-performance desktop application for text-to-image AI model training and generation.

DataBuilder covers the full pipeline: dataset preparation, LoRA / full finetune training
across 17 model architectures, image generation, and model/LoRA library management.
Built with PyTorch + PyQt6. Targets RTX 4090 / H100 class hardware.

**Goal: be the fastest trainer and generator for text-to-image models.**

- GitHub: https://github.com/marmotte5/DataBuilder-
- License: MIT
- Python: 3.10+
- Install: `pip install "dataset-sorter[all]"`
- Launch GUI: `dataset-sorter`
- MCP server: `dataset-sorter-mcp serve-mcp`

## Supported architectures (17)

SD 1.5, SD 2.x, SDXL, Pony Diffusion, SD3, SD 3.5, Flux, Flux 2,
Z-Image, PixArt Sigma, Kolors, Stable Cascade, Chroma, AuraFlow, Sana,
Hunyuan DiT, HiDream.

Each architecture supports both LoRA and full finetune training modes.
Model type keys follow the pattern `{arch}_lora` / `{arch}_full`
(e.g. `sdxl_lora`, `flux_full`).

## Key capabilities

- Dataset sorting, filtering, and deduplication
- WD14 and BLIP auto-captioning
- Multi-aspect bucketing for variable-resolution training
- 15+ optimizers: Marmotte (custom), Adafactor, AdamW 8-bit, Prodigy, Lion, SOAP, Muon
- FP8 training, torch.compile, Triton fused kernels, sequence packing
- Image generation with samplers, CFG, seed, img2img, inpainting
- LoRA composition (multiple adapters, per-adapter weights)
- Batch generation from prompt queues, CSV, JSON, TXT
- A/B comparison of models/LoRAs side-by-side
- Model merging: weighted sum, SLERP, add-difference
- Model and LoRA library with favourites, notes, tags, ratings
- VRAM estimation without GPU

## MCP tools

list_supported_models, estimate_vram, train_lora, generate_image,
tag_images, analyze_dataset, scan_models.

## Core files

- `dataset_sorter/models.py` — TrainingConfig dataclass (100+ fields)
- `dataset_sorter/constants.py` — MODEL_TYPES, optimizers, samplers
- `dataset_sorter/trainer.py` — training orchestrator
- `dataset_sorter/generate_worker.py` — generation QThread
- `dataset_sorter/vram_estimator.py` — VRAM estimation (no GPU needed)
- `dataset_sorter/mcp_server.py` — stdio MCP server
- `dataset_sorter/cli.py` — CLI entry point
- `dataset_sorter/train_backend_*.py` — 17 model backends
- `dataset_sorter/optimizers.py` — Marmotte, SOAP, Muon

## Optional docs

- /AGENTS.md — Full AI agent integration guide (MCP setup, Python API, examples)
- /CONTRIBUTING.md — Contribution guidelines
